vllm.title: Changed scheduler to use deques instead of lists
vllm.author: NadavShmayo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently the scheduler uses lists to store the running, waiting and swapped requests.
When iterating over each state queue we pop the first item and append to a new list, which is not good for performance since each pop is O(N) time complexity, which means the scheduler currently runs in O(N^2) tim
